reviews.author: Aparna Chandrika
reviews.review_body: Worst school...i studied here,teaching is good,bt recently i applied for bonofide,worst experience i had ever seen,prabhavathi receptionist behaves very badly and she has to be removed ,she dont want to search my bonofide and said i didnt studied in that school, lazy lady..i asked her for job purpose,then also she didnt issue me bonofide..totally disappointed that i have studied in this school..

reviews.author: Angel Foranza
reviews.review_body: Best school staff and everything is just Excellent to feed a student in the best way ...

reviews.author: Kadem Sudha Rani
reviews.review_body: My School . I study here right from nursery . All my childhood memories and Friends oh..... I miss all of them

reviews.author: memberasu chanakya
reviews.review_body: Being a student of St. Dominic's HS , I should say that it is the right place of learning. I still remember our teachers, especially Dheeren sir who taught us SS and our bio sir Mr. Narasimham. they were our mentors . Not to forget our Mathematics sir Late Mr. AROGYAM SIR.

reviews.author: krishna chaitanya
reviews.review_body: Hai friends happy to see the school after a long time and its a pleasure to me to say is Iam admission no 1.my name is p.venugopal  ssc 1989-90.i thank god for making me a student of the great p.s.reddy sir garu.a big salute to sir.
